name: New England
description: Experience the world-famous fall colors of New England, featuring vibrant maples and stunning mountain vistas across Maine, New Hampshire, Vermont, Massachusetts, Connecticut, and Rhode Island.

name: Blue Ridge Mountains
description: The Blue Ridge Mountains offer an incredibly long and vibrant fall foliage season due to the varied elevations, stretching from Virginia down through North Carolina and Georgia.

name: The Northeast
description: The Northeast transforms into a kaleidoscope of colors each autumn. From the peaks of the Adirondacks to the shores of New Jersey.

name: East Coast
description: Track the fall colors as they sweep down the East Coast, from the early peaks in Maine to the late season warmth in the Carolinas.
